formulation_source_name: Brazil Ministry of Health dTpa page; 2024 national schedule instruction; Ministry pages for maternal dTpa use
formulation_notes: Brazil retains whole-cell DTP and DTP-Hib-HepB primary and childhood booster products in the public schedule while also using adult acellular dTpa in pregnancy; Ministry of Health materials state that gestational dTpa has been offered since 2014, so country-level PRN exposure is coded mixed from 2014 onward.

vaccine_variable_recommendation: aP intro data available for 193 countries (>=15). Prn formulation data available for 15 countries (>=5). Can build both V1 and V2 exposure indices. Curation contributed 15 country entries.
exposure_notes: V1 uses DTP3 plus years since routine/mixed aP intro plus booster_flag; V2 replaces WHO-only timing with curated formulation-aware timing and adds PRN-in-formulation status; V3 swaps the coarse PRN term for role-specific product metadata on routine primary and booster exposure.

vaccine_source: WHO/UNICEF WUENIC; WHO aP introduction export; supplemental vaccine_program.csv
formulation_source_name: China CDC pertussis vaccine immunoprophylaxis page; Shenzhen Kangtai DTaP-Hib-IPV product page; recent China vaccine genomics and review papers
formulation_notes: China CDC states that DTaP had completely replaced DTwP by 2012. Current Chinese acellular products and recent reviews indicate heterogeneous antigen composition, including PRN-positive component or co-purified vaccines and PRN-negative two-component vaccines, so post-2012 country-level PRN exposure is curated as mixed rather than uniformly PRN-positive.

formulation_source_name: PAHO and MSPAS Guatemala vaccination dashboard launch; WHO-prequalified DTwP-HepB-Hib package insert; PAHO notice on Guatemala hexavalent introduction
formulation_notes: PAHO and MSPAS identify Pentavalente and DPT as routine childhood pertussis-containing vaccines in Guatemala, and the November 2025 PAHO and MSPAS launch of hexavalent indicates that this switch occurred after the analytic GTM row in 2014. The WHO-prequalified DTwP-HepB-Hib package insert specifies whole-cell pertussis vaccine in the pentavalent class, so the pre-hexavalent public schedule is curated as whole-cell and PRN-unexposed with high-confidence class-level support

product_routine_primary_product_list: U.S. routine DTaP and hexavalent programme summary
product_routine_primary_source_name: CDC ACIP 2018 pertussis recommendations; FDA INFANRIX; Merck VAXELIS PI
product_routine_booster_source_name: CDC ACIP DTaP and Tdap page; BOOSTRIX; ADACEL
vaccine_variable_recommendation: aP intro data available for 193 countries (>=15). Prn formulation data available for 15 countries (>=5). Can build both V1 and V2 exposure indices. Curation contributed 15 country entries.
exposure_notes: V1 uses DTP3 plus years since routine/mixed aP intro plus booster_flag; V2 replaces WHO-only timing with curated formulation-aware timing and adds PRN-in-formulation status; V3 swaps the coarse PRN term for role-specific product metadata on routine primary and booster exposure.
